metadata.title: QuoteGen Engine
metadata.description: Modern platform for elegant, interactive web proposals

landing.badge: New enterprise release with Generative AI
landing.heroSubtitle: Paste messy notes. QuoteGen analyzes your client's website, estimates budget, extracts the palette and generates a signable digital proposal.
landing.mockBudgetRationale: Rationale: portal development, mobile ordering app, Stripe integration.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to close deals with a single link.
landing.featureBrandDesc: Automatic analysis of the client's website to extract logo, brand colors and main palette for the proposal.
landing.featureBudgetDesc: Analysis engine that estimates scope complexity from notes, providing smart budget guidance based on the market.
landing.featureSignDesc: Clients view the proposal online and can sign it instantly, updating your workspace in real time.
landing.pricingTitle: Choose the plan for your team
landing.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. Flexible plans for every company size.
landing.planStarterFeatures: 40 proposals/month|3 workspace members|Secure expiring links|Native PDF export
landing.planGrowthFeatures: 300 proposals/month|20 workspace members|Brand AI with vision|Real-time Stripe checkout
landing.planEnterpriseFeatures: 5000 proposals/month|200 workspace members|Advanced workflow management|Priority chat/video support

login.title: Sign in to your Workspace
login.subtitle: Manage proposals, brand assets and digital signatures in one platform.
login.heroTitle: Optimise your B2B sales in seconds.
login.heroDesc: A single workspace to analyse brands, calculate proposal budgets with AI, collect client signatures and sync Stripe billing.
login.feature2: Intelligent Brand Analysis via Scraping & AI Vision
login.subtitleLogin: Sign in with your credentials or a social provider.
login.subtitleRegister: Start generating branded proposals for free.
login.errorSession: Unable to register session on the server.
login.errorFirebase: Email/password login requires Firebase Auth. Use Google or GitHub.
login.errorInvalidCredential: Invalid credentials or user not found.
login.errorEmailInUse: This email is already registered. Sign in with this email.
login.errorWeakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dashboard.createSubtitle: Fill in the fields and generate a branded AI proposal.
dashboard.brandFailed: Brand analysis failed. You can still enter the palette manually.
dashboard.brandSuccess: Brand palette and client details extracted successfully.
dashboard.brandError: Error during analysis. Please try again.
dashboard.enterWebsite: Please enter the client's website first.
dashboard.filesDropHint: Click to upload or drag proposal files here (PDF, DOCX, TXT).
dashboard.filesHelp: Click or drag files to generate a quality proposal.
dashboard.budgetFromFile: Budget will be calculated by AI based on the uploaded proposal.
dashboard.budgetFromAI: Budget estimated by AI based on analysed scope.
dashboard.errRequired: Fill in required fields: company name and at least one proposal file.
dashboard.errConnection: Cannot connect to server for generation. Check configuration.
dashboard.paletteDesc: Inspired by the client's website. Click a circle to copy the HEX code.
dashboard.activateHint: Activate a plan to unlock AI generation and client links.
dashboard.portalReturn: Changes saved in Stripe portal — subscription updates within seconds.

history.title: Proposal history
history.description: All generated proposals are saved in the cloud. You can reopen them at any time and share the link again with the client.

billing.paymentSuccessDesc: Your plan will update automatically within a few seconds. Go back to the dashboard and start generating.
billing.cancelDesc: No charge was made. You can choose a plan whenever you're ready.
billing.limitDesc: You've used all the generations included in your plan. Upgrade to Growth or Enterprise to continue.
billing.title: Plans & billing
billing.description: Manage your subscription, compare plans and update billing in a few clicks. Payments are securely processed by Stripe.
billing.stripeConfigDefault: Payments are not yet available in this environment.

subscribe.title: Activate your subscription
subscribe.description: To generate AI proposals, send links to clients and use brand extraction you need an active plan. Choose the one that fits your workload.
subscribe.feature1Desc: Branded proposals, estimated budget and palette from the client's website.
subscribe.feature2Desc: Stripe checkout: cards, SEPA and invoices from the customer portal.

checkout.invalidPlanDesc: Choose a plan from the subscription page to continue.
checkout.notConfiguredDesc: Stripe public key is missing. Contact the administrator or try again later.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: QuoteGen processes account data, workspaces and proposal content to deliver the SaaS service. Users may request access, rectification, deletion and portability of their data.
privacy.p2: Authentication providers (Google, GitHub, Microsoft, etc.) are managed via Firebase Authentication.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: Use of QuoteGen is subject to compliance with contractual conditions, the limits of the subscribed plan and applicable regulations.
terms.p2: Recurring payments are managed by Stripe. In the event of non-payment, service restrictions may be applied.

proposal.invalid: This proposal or link is invalid or has expired. Contact the sender for a new link.
proposal.signSubtitle: Legal validation via cryptographic electronic signature.
proposal.signHint: Enter your full name to confirm approval of the proposal, budget and specifications described above.
proposal.signNameRequired: Enter your full name to validate the signature.
proposal.signFailed: Signature failed. Try again or contact the administrator.
proposal.signSuccess: Proposal accepted and electronically signed successfully.
